hero.subtitle: Journeys into ancient vineyards, cultural treasures, and exquisite tastes.

homepage.overviewText: Discover the essence of Armenia through our carefully curated signature journeys. Each tour highlights rich heritage, breathtaking landscapes, and authentic wine traditions.
homepage.includedText: Professional guides, comfortable transportation, entrance fees, traditional meals, water, and hotel pickup/drop-off are included in every journey.
homepage.reviewsText: "An incredible experience with amazing guides, exceptional tastings, and unforgettable cultural moments."

ourTours.title: Armenian Wine Tours
ourTours.subtitle: Discover the rich heritage of Armenian winemaking through our expertly curated tours

guests.title: Why Guests Love Wineroad
guests.subtitle: Real stories and reasons from travelers who explored Armenia with Wineroad.

guides.title: Expert Local Guides
guides.description: Our knowledgeable guides share deep insights into Armenian wine culture and history, ensuring an authentic and educational experience.

wine.title: Authentic Wine Experiences
wine.description: Discover traditional winemaking methods and taste premium Armenian wines directly from historic vineyards and family-owned cellars.

transport.title: Comfortable Transportation
transport.description: Travel in style with our modern, air-conditioned vehicles and professional drivers ensuring a safe and comfortable journey.

service.title: Safe & Reliable Service
service.description: We prioritize your safety and satisfaction with secure online booking, comprehensive insurance, and 24/7 customer support.

hero.tagline: Where Armenia opens itself through wine
hero.intro: At Wine Road, we craft refined wine journeys through the soul of Armenia — a land where winemaking began thousands of years ago, and where every road has a story.
hero.imageQuote: Not just seeing Armenia — feeling it.

about.quoteBand: We believe wine is more than a drink. It is a bond — with the soil, with people, and with time.

story.title: Our story
story.subtitle: Every stop and connection — thoughtfully chosen for your experience
story.block1: Our experiences go beyond ordinary tours. They are carefully designed journeys where wine merges with culture, history, and atmosphere — creating something truly personal and memorable.
story.block2: From boutique wineries and hidden vineyards to ancient monasteries, stunning landscapes, and local encounters — each route reveals Armenia at its most authentic and subtle.
story.block3Before: And through Wine Road we invite you not merely to see Armenia, but to

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p1: To redefine wine tourism in Armenia by creating elevated, thoughtful journeys that unite heritage, culture, and contemporary experience.
mission.p2: Our goal is to present Armenia as a world-class wine destination — emphasizing authenticity, attention to detail, and emotion.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: Four pillars on which we build every journey

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.body: We work with real places, people, and stories — preserving Armenia's true spirit.

curation.title: Thoughtful curation
curation.body: Every route and stop is chosen with care to create a complete, harmonious experience.

atmosphere.title: Atmosphere
atmosphere.body: We create not only routes, but moods — from mornings in the vineyard to sunset on the hill.

quality.title: Quality over quantity
quality.body: Without rushing — only deep, memorable experiences.

connection.title: Connection
connection.body: Between wine and culture. Between person and place. Between past and present.
